description: Inject current workspace Taskferry context at session start

hooks.command: if command -v taskferry >/dev/null 2>&1; then context="$(taskferry context --directory \"${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}\" --format toon)" && printf '%s\n' "$context" | node -e 'const fs = require("node:fs"); const additionalContext = fs.readFileSync(0, "utf8"); process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({ hookSpecificOutput: { hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext } }));'; else printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"taskferry is unavailable. Install taskferry and ensure it is on PATH, then restart Claude Code."}}'; fi
